title: SHC Enhanced Fire
body:
No Optifine Required

This pack change the fire model for make it looks like the campfire fire model (This pack has 2 versions)

- The normal version change the fire model and add fire variants for make it looks less repetitive 

- The lite version change the fire model but no add fire variants

Feel free to Combine it with your favorite texture packs!

Have a nice day!
